patches.summary: Use GetJSON (plain HTTP) instead of surf's browser-emulating client for API calls requiring Accept: application/json.
patches.reason: Surf's browser-emulating client overrides the Accept header, breaking TSDR API JSON responses. GetJSON uses a plain net/http client with explicit Accept: application/json.
patches.validated_outcome: API calls return valid JSON; previously returned HTML/XML when surf set Accept: text/html.

patches.summary: Rewrite response parsers for TSDR API's actual envelope structure and field names.
patches.reason: TSDR API uses non-standard envelope structures ({trademarks:[{status:{}, parties:{}}]}) and short field names that don't match spec-derived code.
patches.validated_outcome: Trademark status, batch, and timeline commands correctly parse TSDR API responses.

patches.summary: Disable sync/archive for TSDR since the API has no JSON list endpoints.
patches.reason: TSDR API only returns individual record lookups, not paginated list endpoints. Sync and archive workflows require list capabilities.
patches.validated_outcome: Sync command informs user that TSDR doesn't support bulk sync; no silent failures.

patches.summary: Add watch cache ID field using serialNumber as the key for trademark watch entries.
patches.reason: tmWatchEntry uses serialNumber as the unique identifier, not a generic 'id' field.
patches.validated_outcome: Trademark watch correctly caches and compares previous status using serial number keys.

patches.reason: The casedocs info endpoint returns XML regardless of Accept header; CLI needs special handling.
patches.validated_outcome: Document listing handles XML response from casedocs endpoint.
